title: Blakea pluvialis
taxonomy: Blakea pluvialis is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Blakea pluvialis is classified within the genus Blakea, which contains approximately 35 species of plants. The plant is characterized by its showy white or purple flowers and woody stems. Blakea pluvialis is a relatively rare and understudied species in the botanical community.
